name: Mister Monkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a circle from one slice of bread for the face.
2. Cut another slice of bread into a circle for the muzzle and two small circles for the ears.
3. Spread peanut butter on the face and ears.
4. Place the muzzle on the face.
5. Use M&Ms to decorate the nose and eyes.
6. Use sunflower seeds to create the mouth.
